pr.title: Non-record: LLaDA-MDLM Diffusion — val_var_bpb 1.1465 (first diffusion to beat AR baseline)

output.summary: Bidirectional 11L transformer trained as MDLM masked diffusion with adaLN timesteps, frozen logits, and discrete absorbing-mask ELBO evaluation to oust the AR baseline.
techniques: MDLM masked diffusion on 11L 512d bidirectional transformer
adaLN timestep conditioning + frozen visible logits
Discrete absorbing-mask ELBO eval instead of MC sampling
